summary: Tested ROOK TTRPG app frontend features: dice roller, player combat tab (HP tracker, attacks, death saves, roll mode toggle, initiative), quick dice bar, GM Screen dice roller, skill/saving throw buttons. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: HP tracker with DMG/HEAL buttons and input field working correctly (data-testid: hp-tracker, hp-damage-btn, hp-heal-btn, hp-input)
Attack rows have clickable to-hit buttons (red, +5 modifier) and damage buttons (gold, 1d8+3) - both trigger 3D dice roller
Roll mode toggle (Disadv/Normal/Adv) visible and functional (data-testid: roll-mode-toggle, roll-mode-advantage, roll-mode-disadvantage)
Death saves section appears when HP <= 0 with 'Roll Save' button (data-testid: death-saves, roll-death-save)
Rules edition badge (2014/2024) shows in stat pills - 2014 gray, 2024 pink
Initiative stat pill is clickable and triggers dice roll (data-testid: roll-initiative)
Quick dice bar at bottom shows d4, d6, d8, d10, d12, d20, D% - all clickable (data-testid: quick-d4 through quick-d100)
GM Screen DiceRoller has good contrast with dark purple background and readable text
GM Screen DiceRoller shows Advantage/Disadvantage buttons for D20 (data-testid: roll-advantage, roll-disadvantage)
Skill check buttons trigger 3D dice roller when clicked (data-testid: skill-athletics, etc.)
Saving throw buttons trigger 3D dice roller when clicked
Fighter class has features_2024 variant with Weapon Mastery, Tactical Mind, Tactical Shift, Tactical Master, Studied Attacks
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: HP tracker, clickable attacks, death saves with skull animation, roll mode toggle, initiative click, quick dice bar, GM dice roller contrast, advantage/disadvantage buttons, skill/saving throw buttons. Fighter 2024 rules differentiation implemented in classFeatures.js.

player_combat_tab.hp_tracker: Working - DMG/HEAL buttons, input field, HP bar
player_combat_tab.attack_buttons: Working - to-hit (red, +5) and damage (gold, 1d8+3) clickable, trigger 3D dice
player_combat_tab.death_saves: Working - appears at HP 0, Roll Save button, pass/fail circles, skull animation on fail
player_combat_tab.rules_edition_badge: Working - 2014 (gray) and 2024 (pink) badges in stat pills
player_combat_tab.initiative_click: Working - Init stat pill clickable, triggers dice roll

quick_dice_bar.functionality: All buttons clickable, trigger 3D dice roller

gm_screen_dice_roller.contrast: Good - dark purple background with readable white/cyan text
gm_screen_dice_roller.advantage_disadvantage: Working - buttons visible when D20 selected, correctly keep high/low
gm_screen_dice_roller.dice_selection: D4, D6, D8, D10, D12, D20, D100 all available

skill_saving_throw_buttons.skills: All 18 skills clickable, trigger 3D dice roller with correct modifiers
skill_saving_throw_buttons.saving_throws: All 6 ability saves clickable, trigger 3D dice roller
